en: Then Bildad the Shuhite answered and said:
zh: 書亞人比勒達回答說：

en: "How long will you say these things, and the words of your mouth be a great wind?
zh: “這些話你要說到幾時， 你口中的言語像狂風到幾時呢？

en: Does God pervert justice? Or does the Almighty pervert the right?
zh: 神怎會歪曲公平？ 全能者怎會屈枉公義？

en: If your children have sinned against him, he has delivered them into the hand of their transgression.
zh: 你的兒女若得罪了他， 他就因他們的過犯撇棄他們。

en: If you will seek God and plead with the Almighty for mercy,
zh: 你若殷勤尋求 神， 向全能者懇求；

en: if you are pure and upright, surely then he will rouse himself for you and restore your rightful habitation.
zh: 你若又潔淨又正直， 他就必為你奮起， 復興你公義的居所。

en: And though your beginning was small, your latter days will be very great.
zh: 你起初雖然微小， 到後來必定非常興旺。

en: "For inquire, please, of bygone ages, and consider what the fathers have searched out.
zh: 請你查問前幾代， 留意他們列祖所查究的。

en: For we are but of yesterday and know nothing, for our days on earth are a shadow.
zh: 我們只是昨天才有的，所以一無所知； 我們在世的日子不過是影兒。

en: Will they not teach you and tell you and utter words out of their understanding?
zh: 難道他們不指教你，告訴你， 從心裡發出言語來嗎？

en: "Can papyrus grow where there is no marsh? Can reeds flourish where there is no water?
zh: 蒲草沒有泥，怎能生長？ 蘆葦沒有水，怎能長大呢？

en: While yet in flower and not cut down, they wither before any other plant.
zh: 尚青還沒有割下來的時候， 就比百草先枯槁。

en: Such are the paths of all who forget God; the hope of the godless shall perish.
zh: 忘記 神的，他們的末路也是這樣； 不敬虔的人，他的指望必成泡影。

en: His confidence is severed, and his trust is a spider's web.
zh: 他所自恃的，必被折斷； 他所靠賴的，不過是蜘蛛網。

en: He leans against his house, but it does not stand; he lays hold of it, but it does not endure.
zh: 他倚靠自己的家，家卻立不住， 他抓緊自己的家，家卻存不久。

en: He is a lush plant before the sun, and his shoots spread over his garden.
zh: 他在陽光之下，枝潤葉青， 它的嫩枝長滿園子，

en: His roots entwine the stone heap; he looks upon a house of stones.
zh: 它的根纏繞石堆， 扎入石地之中。

en: If he is destroyed from his place, then it will deny him, saying, 'I have never seen you.'
zh: 他若從本處被拔除， 那處就否認他，說：‘我沒有見過你。’

en: Behold, this is the joy of his way, and out of the soil others will spring.
zh: 看哪，這就是他人生的樂趣， 往後必有別的人從塵土中生出來。

en: "Behold, God will not reject a blameless man, nor take the hand of evildoers.
zh: 看哪， 神必不離棄完全人， 也不扶助行惡的人之手；

en: He will yet fill your mouth with laughter, and your lips with shouting.
zh: 他還要以歡笑充滿你的口， 以歡呼充滿你的嘴。

en: Those who hate you will be clothed with shame, and the tent of the wicked will be no more."
zh: 恨你的都必以羞恥為衣， 惡人的帳棚必歸於無有。”
